notes: Floor numbers represent driver+scorer correctness, not memd retrieval quality.

When the HTTP backend wires in (follow-up after V5 substrate gate), this floor is replaced with real-memd numbers and the propagation_rate / provenance_correctness pass-gate knobs may need to drop accordingly.
Regression check: per-scenario recall_at_1 (propagation_rate) and recall_at_3 (provenance_correctness) must not drop below floor - tolerance.
